name: Mustard Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and cut them into pieces.
2. Boil the beans in salted water until they are tender.
3. In a separate pot, make a sauce by boiling together the sugar, flour, mustard, celery seed, turmeric, and wine vinegar until it thickens.
4. Pour the sauce over the cooked beans and mix well.
5. Allow the mixture to cool before bottling.
